corrections.description: Article file contains wrong poem content - has 'LATE WORD' poem instead of 'OCTOBER 21st' poem
corrections.text:
[Vol57 | October 1970 | Page 757 | Poetry | October 21st, Marilyn | M. Oswald]
[October 21st, Marilyn M. Oswald]

OCTOBER 21st

Eyes blue, tears of pain,
hair none, years come,
autumn day, years wane.
Golden sun. Loved and fed
Crisp air, then wed.
Leaves falling, It's nice to "be."
mother sewing, Thanks, Mom
dau

corrections.description: Author name is incomplete, missing 'Roberts' at the end
Article file contains completely wrong content - appears to be from a different story rather than the Hope poem
corrections.text:
HOPE

Snow, deep snow everywhere,
But high on a limb, a robin's there.

—Grayce E. Cutler
